creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
The only difference I can see is that you are running 14.2, and I am testing on 14.1. However, I have tested other versions, especially 13.3 and 13.4, with the same results. I am not exactly sure what is happening, but it looks to me that it is still trying to download some mods from the internet.

But now I am thinking about it from a different perspective. Is it important to build please using please or simply have the please binary in any way possible? I am opting out for the later. I am updating this to 15.17.1 to check my theory, and if it works, I will most probably give up the plan of the building please with please. Await my commit tomorrow.
